# Git

> Runs Git operations (status, diff, log, commit, branch, etc.) in a local repository. Blocks destructive flags for safety.

| Property | Value |
|----------|-------|
| Version | 1.0 |
| Category | vcs |
| Requires network | yes |
| Requires credentials | no |
| Modifies state | yes |
| Cacheable | auto |

## Parameters

These are sent by the LLM at runtime when it calls the tool.

| Name | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| operation | string | yes | - | Git operation (e.g., status, diff, log, commit, branch) |
| repo_path | string | no | . | Path to the git repository (default: current directory) |
| args | array[string] | no | - | Additional arguments to pass to the git command |

## YAML Config

Optional overrides passed via the agent YAML config block.

*No config options.*

## Usage

### Simple (no config)

```yaml
agent:
  tools:
    - "Git"
```

## Result Schema

Returns unstructured text.
